problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Combining Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
